hero.title: Igicumbi cy'ubuhanzi, ubushakashatsi, hamwe n'ibitekerezo rusange.
hero.subtitle: Ahantu ho kubyara ibitekerezo, ubushakashatsi n'imyidagaduro y'ubugeni.

about.title: Ibyerekeye
about.body: Ikigo cya Gihanga cy’Ubugeni bugezweho GICA ni ikigo kidaharanira inyungu. GICA ni igicumbi cy’isomero, imurikabikorwa, urubuga rwo kwidagaduriramo no gukinirwa imikino, icyumba cyo kwerekeramo amashusho, sitidiyo n’uburyo bwo kwakira abahanzi. Inyubako ifite ubuso bwa metero kare 777 yagenewe gushyigikira abahanzi b’Abanyarwanda n’akarere binyuze mu imurikabikorwa riteguwe neza, ahantu ho gusangirira ibikorwa by’ubuhanzi, no mu bushake bwo guteza imbere ibiganiro n’uguhangana kw’imitima mu by’ubugeni.

contributors.title: Abagize uruganda
contributors.subtitle: Turashaka gushimira abantu n’imiryango ikurikira baduteye inkunga muri uru rugendo, byadufashije kubaka no gushyiraho umusingi ukomeye wo kugerageza ubuhanzi

benefactor.heading: UMUTERANKUNGA
benefactor.body: Turashimira inkunga y’agaciro twahawe na Mellon Foundation, umuterankunga wacu.
